---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

---
title: "PatientGeneratorPosit"
output: html_document
---

# Project Overview

This is a simple project designed to launch instances of [PatientGenerator](https://github.com/OHDSI/PatientGenerator/) to a **Posit Connect** server.
